summary: All 4 user-requested features tested and verified working: 1) Share Button on ReelGenerator and StoryGenerator pages, 2) Email Notification Service (stubbed with DB logging), 3) Copyright page with comprehensive legal guidelines, 4) Profile page with full user management. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ShareButton component properly imported in both ReelGenerator.js (line 12) and StoryGenerator.js (line 13)
Profile.js has all required sections: Profile Information, Change Password, Email Notifications, Data & Privacy, Danger Zone
CopyrightInfo.js has comprehensive legal content with 7 main sections
Dashboard.js has Profile button in header and Copyright & Legal link in footer
Backend server.py has all profile endpoints: PUT /api/auth/profile, PUT /api/auth/password, GET /api/auth/export-data, DELETE /api/auth/account
Email notification service is stubbed with DB logging (email_logs collection) - ready for SMTP integration
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_profile_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for profile features
seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_ prefix for password change and account deletion tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features are working: 1) ShareButton appears after content generation on both Reel and Story pages, 2) Email notifications are stubbed (logged to email_logs collection), 3) Copyright page at /app/copyright has comprehensive legal guidelines, 4) Profile page at /app/profile has profile update, password change, notification preferences, data export, and account deletion. Dashboard has Profile button in header and Copyright & Legal link in footer.

share_button.note: ShareButton appears after content generation with Download Card and Copy Link options

email_notification_service.note: Email notifications are stubbed - logged to email_logs collection in MongoDB. Ready for SMTP integration.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/auth/export-data: PASS - Exports user data in JSON format
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/auth/account: PASS - Deletes user account and all data

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Logged to DB but not actually sent
